'''The Belk''' was an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid field]] that was located within the [[Colavas system]],<ref name="KKT" /> in the [[Halla sector/Legends|Halla sector]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="TEA" />
